loader.HTML:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <meta name="myop:size" content='{"width":"100%","height":"100%"}'>
    <script type="myop/types">
        // =============================================================================
        // MYOP COMPONENT TYPE DEFINITIONS
        // =============================================================================

        /**
         * Data structure passed to myop_init_interface(data)
         */
        interface MyopInitData {
          header: {
            title: string;
          };
          dashboardTitle?: string;
          emptyState: {
            title: string;
            description: string;
            buttonLabel: string;
          };
          liveUrl?: string;
          sectionTitle?: string;
          hint?: string;
          requests?: Array<{
            id: string;
            title: string;
            slug?: string;
            thumbnailUrl?: string;
            previewHtml?: string;
            status?: 'open' | 'closed';
            implementations?: Array<{
              id: string;
              title: string;
              statusLabel?: string;
              statusDate?: string;
              author?: string;
              tag?: 'claimed' | 'ready-for-review';
            }>;
          }>;
        }

        /**
         * Actions and payloads for myop_cta_handler(action, payload)
         */
        interface MyopCtaPayloads {
          'close-request': { requestId: string };
          'copy-link': { requestId: string };
          'edit-request': { requestId: string };
          'reopen-request': { requestId: string };
          'new-request-clicked': void;
          'implementation-clicked': { requestId: string; implementationId: string };
          'request-deselected': { requestId: string };
          'request-selected': { requestId: string };
          'size-requested': {
            width?: number | null;
            height?: number | null;
            minWidth?: number | null;
            maxWidth?: number | null;
            minHeight?: number | null;
            maxHeight?: number | null;
            required?: boolean;
          };
        }

        // =============================================================================
        // DO NOT EDIT BELOW - Standard Myop type declarations
        // =============================================================================

        declare function myop_init_interface(): MyopInitData;
        declare function myop_init_interface(data: MyopInitData): void;

        declare function myop_cta_handler<K extends keyof MyopCtaPayloads>(
          action: K,
          payload: MyopCtaPayloads[K]
        ): void;
    </script>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Inter:wght@400&display=block"
          rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        * {
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        html, body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            height: 100%;
            overflow: hidden;
            font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
        }

        #app-root {
            height: 100%;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            background: #FFFFFF;
            overflow-y: auto;
        }

        /* Custom Scrollbar Styling */
        ::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 8px;
        }

        ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: transparent;
        }

        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background: #D9D9D9;
            border-radius: 80px;
        }

        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
            background: #C0C0C0;
        }

        /* Firefox scrollbar */
        * {
            scrollbar-width: thin;
            scrollbar-color: #D9D9D9 transparent;
        }

        /* Mobile Dashboard Title */
        .mobile-dashboard-title {
            display: none;
            padding: 19px 20px;
            font-family: "DM Sans", sans-serif;
            font-size: 24px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: normal;
            color: #1C1B1F;
            text-align: center;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #E5E4E4;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        @media (max-width: 560px) {
            .mobile-dashboard-title {
                display: block;
            }

            .header-title {
                display: none;
            }

            .requests-grid {
                flex-direction: column;
            }

            .request-card,
            .new-request-card {
                flex: none !important;
                width: 100% !important;
                max-width: 100% !important;
                min-width: 0 !important;
                height: auto !important;
                flex-direction: row !important;
                align-items: center !important;
                gap: 16px !important;
                padding: 8px !important;
            }

            .request-card-thumbnail {
                width: 120px;
                min-width: 120px;
                height: 80px;
                align-self: auto;
                aspect-ratio: auto;
            }

            .new-request-card-icon {
                width: 36px;
                height: 36px;
            }

            .new-request-card {
                display: flex !important;
                position: static !important;
                flex-direction: row !important;
                flex-wrap: nowrap !important;
                justify-content: normal !important;
                align-items: center !important;
                gap: 2px !important;
                width: 100% !important;
                height: 70px !important;
                min-width: auto !important;
                min-height: auto !important;
                box-sizing: border-box !important;
                margin: 0 !important;
                padding: 4px 16px !important;
            }

            .request-card-footer {
                flex: 1;
                min-width: 0;
            }

            .implementations-grid {
                flex-direction: column;
            }

            .impl-card {
                flex: none !important;
                width: 100% !important;
                max-width: 100% !important;
                min-width: 0 !important;
                height: 90px !important;
                flex-direction: row !important;
                align-items: center !important;
                gap: 16px !important;
                padding: 8px !important;
            }

            .impl-tag {
                position: absolute;
                right: 12px;
                bottom: 12px;
                margin-top: 0;
            }

            .context-menu {
                top: 50% !important;
                right: 8px !important;
                margin-top: 12px !important;
            }
        }

        /* Header */
        .header {
            padding-top: 28px;
            padding-right: 20px;
            padding-bottom: 28px;
            padding-left: 20px;
            margin: 0;
            border-radius: 0;
            border: none;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--Grey-5, #F5F3F3);
            background-image: linear-gradient(86deg, rgba(240, 232, 255, 0.4) -6.17%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4) 76.6%, rgba(255, 237, 231, 0.4) 95.9%);
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .header-content {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 16px;
        }

        .header-logo {
            width: 56px;
            height: 56px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            display: block;
        }

        .header-text {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 0;
            flex: 1;
            min-width: 0;
            font-family: "DM Sans", sans-serif;
        }

        .header-title {
            font-family: "DM Sans", sans-serif;
            font-size: 20px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 28px;
            color: rgb(28, 27, 31);
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .header-subtitle {
            font-family: "DM Sans", sans-serif;
            font-size: 13px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 300;
            line-height: 18px;
            color: #1C1B1F;
        }

        /* Empty State */
        .empty-state {
            flex: 1;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            padding: 40px 24px;
            min-height: 0;
        }

        .empty-state-icon {
            width: 60px;
            height: 60px;
            aspect-ratio: 1/1;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
        }

        .empty-state-title {
            color: var(--Grey-90, #3E3D3E);
            text-align: center;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 16px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 700;
            line-height: 24px;
            margin: 0 0 6px 0;
        }

        .empty-state-description {
            color: var(--Grey-90, #3E3D3E);
            text-align: center;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 13px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 18px;
            margin: 0 0 16px 0;
            max-width: 280px;
        }

        .btn-new-request-empty {
            display: flex;
            height: 30px;
            padding: 6px 12px;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            background: var(--Grey-90, #3E3D3E);
            color: var(--White, #FFF);
            border: none;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 13px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 18px;
            text-align: right;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: background 0.15s ease;
        }

        .btn-new-request-empty:hover {
            background: #9747FF;
        }

        .btn-new-request-empty:active {
            background: #1A1A1A;
        }

        .btn-new-request-empty .btn-label {
            color: var(--White, #FFF);
            text-align: right;
            font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 18px;
        }

        .btn-new-request-empty svg {
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
        }

        /* Filled State */
        .filled-state {
            display: none;
            flex-direction: column;
            padding: 24px 0 0 0;
            margin: 0 20px;
            flex: 1;
            min-height: 0;
        }

        .section-header {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin: 0 0 16px 0;
        }

        .section-title {
            color: var(--Grey-90, #3E3D3E);
            font-family: "DM Sans", sans-serif;
            font-size: 20px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 500;
            line-height: 28px;
            letter-spacing: -0.2px;
            height: 28.0035px;
            margin: 0;
        }

        .requests-grid {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 16px;
            align-items: flex-start;
        }

        /* New Request Card */
        .new-request-card {
            display: flex;
            width: 180px;
            height: 151px;
            padding: 4px 16px;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            border-radius: 12px;
            border: 1px solid var(--Purple-10, #DECCFF);
            background: linear-gradient(105deg, rgba(240, 232, 255, 0.40) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.40) 78%, rgba(255, 237, 231, 0.40) 97%);
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: border-color 0.15s ease, background 0.2s ease;
        }

        .new-request-card:hover {
            border-color: #DECCFF;
            background: linear-gradient(-4deg, rgba(240, 232, 255, 0.40) -6.17%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.40) 76.6%, rgba(255, 237, 231, 0.40) 95.9%);
        }

        /* Dashed border marching ants animation */
        .new-request-card-icon path[stroke-dasharray] {
            stroke-dasharray: 4 2;
            stroke-dashoffset: 0;
            transition: stroke-dashoffset 0.6s ease;
        }

        .new-request-card:hover .new-request-card-icon path[stroke-dasharray] {
            stroke-dashoffset: 24;
        }

        .new-request-card-icon {
            width: 48.825px;
            height: 48.788px;
        }

        .new-request-card-label {
            color: var(--Grey-90, #3E3D3E);
            font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 18px;
            text-align: center;
        }

        /* Request Card */
        .request-card {
            position: relative;
            display: flex;
            width: 180px;
            height: 151px;
            padding: 8px;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: flex-start;
            gap: 10px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            border: 1px solid var(--Grey-10, #E5E4E4);
            background: #FFFFFF;
            overflow: visible;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: border-color 0.2s ease, background 0.2s ease;
        }

        .request-card:hover {
            border-color: #8039FD;
        }

        .request-card-thumbnail {
            height: 108.729px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            align-self: stretch;
            aspect-ratio: 164.00 / 108.73;
            border-radius: 8px;
            background: linear-gradient(86deg, rgba(240, 232, 255, 0.40) -6.17%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.40) 76.6%, rgba(255, 237, 231, 0.40) 95.9%), #FFF;
            overflow: hidden;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .request-card-thumbnail {
            position: relative;
        }

        .request-card-thumbnail img {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
        }

        .closed-tag {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 6px;
            left: 6px;
            z-index: 4;
            display: inline-flex;
            height: 20px;
            padding: 1px 8px;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            border: 0.5px solid var(--Grey-20, #D3D1D5);
            background: var(--Red-5, #FFECE4);
            color: var(--Black, #0A090A);
            text-align: right;
            font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
            font-size: 12px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 24px;
        }

        .request-card-thumbnail .placeholder-thumb {
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            opacity: 0.3;
        }

        /* Preview loading state */
        .request-card-preview-loading {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            bottom: 0;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            background: linear-gradient(86deg, rgba(240, 232, 255, 0.40) -6.17%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.40) 76.6%, rgba(255, 237, 231, 0.40) 95.9%), #FFF;
            z-index: 2;
            opacity: 1;
            transition: opacity 0.25s ease;
        }

        .request-card-preview-loading .myop-logo {
            animation: previewLogoPulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        @keyframes previewLogoPulse {
            0%, 100% {
                opacity: 0.6;
                transform: scale(1);
            }
            50% {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: scale(1.05);
            }
        }

        /* Preview iframe */
        .request-card-preview-iframe {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 656px;
            height: 435px;
            border: none;
            background: #fff;
            transform: scale(0.25);
            transform-origin: top left;
            z-index: 1;
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.25s ease;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        /* When loaded: show iframe, hide loader */
        .request-card-thumbnail.preview-loaded .request-card-preview-iframe {
            opacity: 1;
        }

        .request-card-thumbnail.preview-loaded .request-card-preview-loading {
            opacity: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
            transition: opacity 0.4s ease;
        }

        /* Cover to block iframe interaction */
        .request-card-preview-cover {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            bottom: 0;
            z-index: 3;
            background: transparent;
        }

        .request-card-footer {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 0 4px;
            align-self: stretch;
            flex: 1;
            min-height: 0;
        }

        .request-card-title-wrapper {
            flex: 1;
            min-width: 0;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .request-card-title {
            color: var(--Grey-90, #3E3D3E);
            font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 500;
            line-height: 18px;
            white-space: nowrap;
            overflow: hidden;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
            display: block;
        }

        .request-card-menu {
            position: relative;
            width: 24px;
            height: 24px;
            border: 1px solid transparent;
            background: transparent;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            border-radius: 4px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            padding: 0;
            transition: background 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease;
        }

        .request-card-menu:hover {
            background: #F0E8FF;
            border-color: #DECCFF;
        }

        .request-card-menu svg {
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
        }

        /* Selected Card State */
        .request-card.selected {
            border-radius: 8px;
            border: 1px solid var(--Purple-90, #8039FD);
            background: var(--Purple-2, #F9F6FF);
        }

        /* Implementations Section */
        .implementations-section {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            margin-top: 33px;
            transition: opacity 0.25s ease;
            opacity: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
            height: 0;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .implementations-section.visible {
            opacity: 1;
            pointer-events: auto;
            height: auto;
            overflow: visible;
        }

        .implementations-title {
            color: var(--Grey-90, #3E3D3E);
            font-family: "DM Sans", sans-serif;
            font-size: 20px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 600;
            line-height: 28px;
            letter-spacing: -0.2px;
            height: 28.0035px;
            margin: 0;
        }

        .implementations-grid {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 24px;
            align-items: flex-start;
            padding-bottom: 20px;
            margin-top: 22px;
        }

        .impl-card {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            width: 180px;
            height: 118px;
            padding: 16px;
            border-radius: 12.125px;
            border: 1px solid var(--Grey-10, #E5E4E4);
            background: var(--White, #FFF);
            align-items: flex-start;
            overflow: hidden;
            position: relative;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: border-color 0.2s ease;
        }

        .impl-card:hover {
            border-color: #8039FD;
        }

        .impl-card-content {
            display: flex;
            flex: 1;
            align-items: flex-start;
            justify-content: space-between;
            width: 100%;
            min-height: 0;
        }

        .impl-card-info {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 3.25px;
            flex: 1;
            min-width: 0;
        }

        .impl-card-title-wrapper {
            width: 100%;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .impl-card-title {
            font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 600;
            line-height: 18px;
            color: var(--Grey-90, #3E3D3E);
            white-space: nowrap;
            overflow: hidden;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
            display: block;
        }

        .impl-card-status {
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            font-size: 11px;
            font-weight: 400;
            font-style: normal;
            line-height: 14px;
            color: var(--Grey-80, #5A595B);
        }

        .impl-card-author {
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            font-size: 11px;
            font-weight: 400;
            font-style: normal;
            line-height: 14px;
            color: var(--Grey-90, #3E3D3E);
        }

        .impl-tag {
            display: flex;
            height: 18px;
            padding: 1px 8px;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            background: var(--loading-button, linear-gradient(237deg, #FF7133 19.7%, #7C69FD 75.96%));
            color: var(--White, #FFF);
            text-align: right;
            font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
            font-size: 12px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 500;
            width: fit-content;
            margin-top: auto;
        }

        .implementations-empty {
            font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 500;
            line-height: 28px;
            letter-spacing: -0.2px;
            width: fit-content;
            background: linear-gradient(266deg, #FF5B14 -2.48%, #715EF0 109.11%);
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            background-clip: text;
            margin-top: 6px;
            transition: opacity 0.25s ease, height 0.25s ease, margin 0.25s ease;
            opacity: 1;
        }

        /* Context Menu */
        .context-menu {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 100%;
            margin-left: 4px;
            z-index: 100;
            display: flex;
            width: 165px;
            min-width: 120px;
            padding: 4px;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: flex-start;
            border-radius: 8px;
            border: 1px solid var(--Grey-10, #E5E4E4);
            background: #FFF;
            box-shadow: 0px 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
        }

        .context-menu-item {
            display: flex;
            height: 36px;
            padding: 8px 8px 8px 16px;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            align-self: stretch;
            width: 100%;
            border: none;
            background: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: background 0.15s ease;
        }

        .context-menu-item span {
            overflow: hidden;
            color: var(--Grey-90, #3E3D3E);
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
            font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 18px;
        }

        .context-menu-item:hover {
            background: #F5F0FF;
        }

        .context-menu-item svg {
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .context-menu-item.disabled {
            cursor: default !important;
        }

        .context-menu-item.disabled * {
            cursor: default !important;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        .context-menu-item.disabled:hover {
            background: none;
        }

        .context-menu-item.disabled span {
            color: var(--Grey-40, #B6B5B7);
        }

        .context-menu-item.disabled svg {
            stroke: var(--Grey-40, #B6B5B7);
        }

        .context-menu-item.disabled svg path {
            stroke: var(--Grey-40, #B6B5B7);
        }

        .context-menu-overlay {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            z-index: 99;
        }

        /* Tooltip */
        .context-menu-item[data-tooltip] {
            position: relative;
        }

        .context-menu-item[data-tooltip]::after {
            content: attr(data-tooltip);
            position: absolute;
            top: 100%;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            margin-top: 5px;
            background: var(--White, #FFF);
            color: var(--Black, #0A090A);
            border: 1px solid var(--Grey-20, #D3D1D5);
            border-radius: 4px;
            padding: 8px 12px;
            font-family: "DM Sans", sans-serif;
            font-size: 12px;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 14px;
            white-space: nowrap;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 12px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
            z-index: 1001;
            pointer-events: none;
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease 0s;
        }

        .context-menu-item[data-tooltip]:hover::after {
            opacity: 1;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease 0.5s;
        }

        /* Hint text */
        .hint-text {
            font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 500;
            line-height: 28px;
            letter-spacing: -0.2px;
            width: fit-content;
            background: linear-gradient(266deg, #FF5B14 -2.48%, #715EF0 109.11%);
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            background-clip: text;
            margin-top: 30px;
            transition: opacity 0.25s ease, height 0.25s ease, margin 0.25s ease;
            opacity: 1;
        }

        .hint-text.hidden {
            opacity: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
            height: 0;
            margin: 0;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        @media (max-width: 560px) {
            .hint-text {
                font-size: 14px;
            }
        }

    </style>
</head>
<body>
<div id="app-root">
    <!-- Mobile Dashboard Title -->
    <div class="mobile-dashboard-title" id="mobile-dashboard-title">Marketplace</div>

    <!-- Header -->
    <div class="header">
        <div class="header-content">
            <svg class="header-logo" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="60" height="60" viewBox="0 0 60 60" fill="none">
                <path d="M16.2004 26.2114L12.7004 29.2244C10.2741 31.3132 6.61635 31.0506 4.51327 28.6366C3.19837 27.1273 2.75114 25.0484 3.32909 23.1319L5.74067 15.1352C7.26889 10.0677 11.9367 6.59998 17.2296 6.59998H41.829M16.2004 26.2114L18.1718 6.59998M16.2004 26.2114C19.8798 29.9775 25.9005 30.0944 29.7233 26.4739L30.0004 26.2114M30.0004 26.2114L30.2662 6.59998M30.0004 26.2114C33.8027 29.9783 39.9721 29.952 43.8004 26.2114M43.8004 26.2114L46.6778 28.9292C49.0687 31.1875 52.8295 31.1092 55.1244 28.7533C56.6522 27.1848 57.2081 24.9104 56.5758 22.8141L54.2601 15.1352C52.7319 10.0677 48.0641 6.59998 42.7712 6.59998H41.829M43.8004 26.2114L41.829 6.59998" stroke="url(#paint0_linear_5092_29337)" stroke-width="2"/>
                <path d="M6.59961 36V41.4C6.59961 48.0274 11.9722 53.4 18.5996 53.4H41.3996C48.027 53.4 53.3996 48.0274 53.3996 41.4V36" stroke="url(#paint1_linear_5092_29337)" stroke-width="2"/>
                <defs>
                    <linearGradient id="paint0_linear_5092_29337" x1="66.0927" y1="24.2" x2="46.0447" y2="51.3719" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
                        <stop offset="0.045" stop-color="#FF7133"/>
                        <stop offset="0.945" stop-color="#7C69FD"/>
                    </linearGradient>
                    <linearGradient id="paint1_linear_5092_29337" x1="60.5996" y1="47.6" x2="48.6628" y2="68.4113" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
                        <stop offset="0.045" stop-color="#FF7133"/>
                        <stop offset="0.945" stop-color="#7C69FD"/>
                    </linearGradient>
                </defs>
            </svg>
            <div class="header-text">
                <div class="header-title" id="header-title">Marketplace</div>
                <div class="header-subtitle" id="header-subtitle">Share component requests with builders outside your organization.
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Empty State -->
    <div class="empty-state" id="empty-state">
        <svg class="empty-state-icon" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="100" height="100" viewBox="0 0 100 100" fill="none">
            <path d="M13 28C13 21.3726 18.3726 16 25 16H77C83.6274 16 89 21.3726 89 28V80C89 86.6274 83.6274 92 77 92H25C18.3726 92 13 86.6274 13 80V28Z" stroke="#8039FD" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-dasharray="4 6"/>
            <path d="M13 29C13 29.6314 13 30.3036 13 30.9989C13 37.6263 18.3726 43 25 43H77C83.6274 43 89 37.6274 89 31V29" stroke="#8039FD" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-dasharray="4 6"/>
            <path d="M40 14.6875C40 8.61237 44.9249 3.6875 51 3.6875C57.0751 3.6875 62 8.61237 62 14.6875" stroke="#8039FD" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-dasharray="4 6"/>
            <circle cx="81.5" cy="78.5" r="15.5" fill="white" stroke="#8039FD"/>
            <line x1="73" y1="78" x2="91" y2="78" stroke="#8039FD" stroke-width="2"/>
            <line x1="82" y1="87" x2="82" y2="69" stroke="#8039FD" stroke-width="2"/>
        </svg>
        <div class="empty-state-title" id="empty-title">Create your first request</div>
        <div class="empty-state-description" id="empty-description">Add details, generate a private link, and share it
            with a builder
        </div>
        <button class="btn-new-request-empty" id="btn-new-request">
            <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none">
                <path d="M8 3V13" stroke="white" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                <path d="M3 8H13" stroke="white" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
            </svg>
            <span class="btn-label">New request</span>
        </button>
    </div>

    <!-- Filled State -->
    <div class="filled-state" id="filled-state">
        <div class="section-header">
            <div class="section-title" id="section-title">Component requests</div>
        </div>

        <div class="requests-grid" id="requests-grid"></div>
        <div class="hint-text" id="hint-text">Select a request to view implementations</div>
        <div class="implementations-section" id="implementations-section">
            <div class="implementations-title">Submissions</div>
            <div class="implementations-empty" id="implementations-empty">No submissions yet</div>
            <div class="implementations-grid" id="implementations-grid"></div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
    (function () {
        var currentData = null;
        var openMenuId = null;
        var closedRequests = {};
        var selectedRequestId = null;
        var lastGridKey = null;

        function getGridKey(requests) {
            if (!requests) return '';
            return requests.map(function (r) {
                return r.id + ':' + (r.previewHtml ? '1' : '0') + ':' + (r.status || '') + ':' + (r.title || '') + ':' + (r.description || '') + ':' + (r.deadline || '') + ':' + (r.contactEmail || '');
            }).join(',');
        }

        function updateSelection() {
            // Update card visual states
            var cards = document.querySelectorAll('.request-card');
            for (var i = 0; i < cards.length; i++) {
                var id = cards[i].getAttribute('data-request-id');
                if (id === selectedRequestId) {
                    cards[i].classList.add('selected');
                } else {
                    cards[i].classList.remove('selected');
                }
            }
            // Toggle hint vs implementations section with smooth transition
            var hintEl = document.getElementById('hint-text');
            var implEl = document.getElementById('implementations-section');
            if (selectedRequestId) {
                hintEl.classList.add('hidden');
                implEl.classList.add('visible');
            } else {
                hintEl.classList.remove('hidden');
                implEl.classList.remove('visible');
            }
            renderImplementations();
        }

        function closeMenu() {
            var existing = document.querySelector('.context-menu');
            var overlay = document.querySelector('.context-menu-overlay');
            if (existing) existing.remove();
            if (overlay) overlay.remove();
            openMenuId = null;
        }

        function openMenu(requestId, btnEl) {
            closeMenu();
            openMenuId = requestId;

            // Overlay to catch outside clicks
            var overlay = document.createElement('div');
            overlay.className = 'context-menu-overlay';
            overlay.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
                e.stopPropagation();
                closeMenu();
            });
            document.body.appendChild(overlay);

            var menu = document.createElement('div');
            menu.className = 'context-menu';
            menu.innerHTML =
                '<button class="context-menu-item" data-action="edit-request">' +
                '<svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">' +
                '<g clip-path="url(#clip0_edit_' + requestId + ')">' +
                '<path d="M13 7L9 3" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>' +
                '<path d="M5.5 14.5L0.5 15.5L1.5 10.5L11.5 0.5L15.5 4.5L5.5 14.5Z" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>' +
                '</g>' +
                '<defs><clipPath id="clip0_edit_' + requestId + '"><rect width="16" height="16" fill="white"/></clipPath></defs>' +
                '</svg>' +
                '<span>Edit request</span>' +
                '</button>' +
                (function () {
                    var request = null;
                    if (currentData && currentData.requests) {
                        for (var r = 0; r < currentData.requests.length; r++) {
                            if (currentData.requests[r].id === requestId) {
                                request = currentData.requests[r];
                                break;
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    var isClosed = request ? isRequestClosed(request) : (closedRequests[requestId] || false);
                    var disabledClass = isClosed ? ' disabled' : '';
                    var copyTooltip = isClosed ? ' data-tooltip="Reopen the request to enable link copying"' : '';
                    return '<button class="context-menu-item' + disabledClass + '" data-action="copy-link" data-request-id="' + requestId + '"' + copyTooltip + '>' +
                        '<svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="copy-icon">' +
                        '<g clip-path="url(#clip0_link_' + requestId + ')">' +
                        '<path d="M7.23774 5.24023C6.88574 5.40823 6.55574 5.63823 6.26474 5.93023L6.25474 5.94023C4.87374 7.32123 4.87374 9.55923 6.25474 10.9402L8.42974 13.1152C9.81074 14.4962 12.0487 14.4962 13.4297 13.1152L13.4397 13.1052C14.8207 11.7242 14.8207 9.48623 13.4397 8.10523L12.5087 7.17423" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>' +
                        '<path d="M8.23775 9.58653C8.58975 9.41853 8.91975 9.18853 9.21075 8.89653L9.22075 8.88653C10.6017 7.50553 10.6017 5.26753 9.22075 3.88653L7.04575 1.71153C5.66475 0.330531 3.42675 0.330531 2.04575 1.71153L2.03575 1.72153C0.65475 3.10253 0.65475 5.34053 2.03575 6.72153L2.96675 7.65253" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>' +
                        '</g>' +
                        '<defs><clipPath id="clip0_link_' + requestId + '"><rect width="16" height="16" fill="white"/></clipPath></defs>' +
                        '</svg>' +
                        '<svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="check-icon" style="display:none;">' +
                        '<path d="M2 8L6 12L14 4" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-width="1" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>' +
                        '</svg>' +
                        '<span class="copy-text">Copy link</span>' +
                        '</button>';
                })() +
                (function () {
                    var request = null;
                    if (currentData && currentData.requests) {
                        for (var r = 0; r < currentData.requests.length; r++) {
                            if (currentData.requests[r].id === requestId) {
                                request = currentData.requests[r];
                                break;
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    var isClosed = request ? isRequestClosed(request) : (closedRequests[requestId] || false);
                    var action = isClosed ? 'reopen-request' : 'close-request';
                    var label = isClosed ? 'Reopen request' : 'Close request';
                    var bagSvg = '<path d="M2 6C2 4.34315 3.34315 3 5 3H11C12.6569 3 14 4.34315 14 6V11C14 12.6569 12.6569 14 11 14H5C3.34315 14 2 12.6569 2 11V6Z" stroke="#3E3D3E"/>' +
                        '<path d="M2 5.5C2 4.11929 3.11929 3 4.5 3H11.5C12.8807 3 14 4.11929 14 5.5C14 6.88071 12.8807 8 11.5 8H4.5C3.11929 8 2 6.88071 2 5.5Z" stroke="#3E3D3E"/>' +
                        '<path d="M6 3C6 1.89543 6.89543 1 8 1C9.10457 1 10 1.89543 10 3" stroke="#3E3D3E"/>';
                    if (isClosed) {
                        bagSvg += '<line x1="0.3" y1="15.7" x2="14.3" y2="1.7" stroke="white" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>';
                        bagSvg += '<line x1="1" y1="15" x2="15" y2="1" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-width="1" stroke-linecap="round"/>';
                    }
                    var tooltip = isClosed ? 'Reopening the request enables link copying' : 'Closing the request disables link copying';
                    return '<button class="context-menu-item" data-action="' + action + '" data-tooltip="' + tooltip + '">' +
                        '<svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">' +
                        bagSvg +
                        '</svg>' +
                        '<span>' + label + '</span>' +
                        '</button>';
                })();

            menu.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
                e.stopPropagation();
                var item = e.target.closest('.context-menu-item');
                if (!item) return;
                var action = item.getAttribute('data-action');

                // Don't proceed if copy-link is disabled
                if (action === 'copy-link' && item.classList.contains('disabled')) {
                    return;
                }

                if (action === 'copy-link') {
                    // Build and copy the link to clipboard
                    var copyRequestId = item.getAttribute('data-request-id');
                    var copyRequest = null;
                    if (currentData && currentData.requests) {
                        for (var ri = 0; ri < currentData.requests.length; ri++) {
                            if (currentData.requests[ri].id === copyRequestId) {
                                copyRequest = currentData.requests[ri];
                                break;
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    if (copyRequest && copyRequest.slug && currentData.liveUrl) {
                        var link = currentData.liveUrl + '/m/' + copyRequest.slug;
                        var ta = document.createElement('textarea');
                        ta.value = link;
                        ta.style.position = 'fixed';
                        ta.style.opacity = '0';
                        document.body.appendChild(ta);
                        ta.select();
                        document.execCommand('copy');
                        document.body.removeChild(ta);
                    }

                    // Show "Copied" feedback
                    var copyIcon = item.querySelector('.copy-icon');
                    var checkIcon = item.querySelector('.check-icon');
                    var copyText = item.querySelector('.copy-text');

                    copyIcon.style.display = 'none';
                    checkIcon.style.display = 'block';
                    copyText.textContent = 'Copied';

                    window.myop_cta_handler('copy-link', {requestId: copyRequestId});

                    // Close menu after brief delay
                    setTimeout(function () {
                        closeMenu();
                    }, 800);
                } else {
                    closeMenu();
                }

                if (action === 'close-request') {
                    closedRequests[requestId] = true;
                } else if (action === 'reopen-request') {
                    closedRequests[requestId] = false;
                }

                window.myop_cta_handler(action, {requestId: requestId});
                // Re-render to update closed tag
                if (action === 'close-request' || action === 'reopen-request') {
                    lastGridKey = null;
                    render(currentData);
                }
            });

            btnEl.appendChild(menu);

            // Keep menu within viewport with minimal margin from edges
            var menuRect = menu.getBoundingClientRect();
            var btnRect = btnEl.getBoundingClientRect();
            var margin = 8;
            if (menuRect.right > window.innerWidth - margin) {
                var desiredLeft = window.innerWidth - margin - menuRect.width - btnRect.left;
                menu.style.left = desiredLeft + 'px';
                menu.style.marginLeft = '0';
            }
            if (menuRect.bottom > window.innerHeight - margin) {
                var desiredTop = window.innerHeight - margin - menuRect.height - btnRect.top;
                menu.style.top = desiredTop + 'px';
            }
        }

        function buildNewRequestCard() {
            return '<div class="new-request-card" id="new-request-card-btn">' +
                '<svg class="new-request-card-icon" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 60 60" fill="none">' +
                '<path d="M9.375 26.2129C9.375 19.5855 14.7476 14.2129 21.375 14.2129H38.775C45.4024 14.2129 50.775 19.5855 50.775 26.2129V40.6129C50.775 47.2403 45.4024 52.6129 38.775 52.6129H21.375C14.7476 52.6129 9.375 47.2403 9.375 40.6129V26.2129Z" stroke="#8039FD" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-dasharray="4 6"/>' +
                '<path d="M9.375 23.7012C9.375 28.0711 12.9175 31.6137 17.2875 31.6137H42.8625C47.2325 31.6137 50.775 28.0711 50.775 23.7012" stroke="#8039FD" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-dasharray="4 6"/>' +
                '<path d="M23.175 14.2129C23.175 10.5678 26.13 7.61289 29.775 7.61289C33.4201 7.61289 36.375 10.5678 36.375 14.2129" stroke="#8039FD" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-dasharray="4 6"/>' +
                '<circle cx="48.9001" cy="47.1008" r="9.3" fill="white" stroke="#8039FD"/>' +
                '<line x1="43.8" y1="46.4004" x2="54.6" y2="46.4004" stroke="#8039FD" stroke-width="2"/>' +
                '<line x1="48.8" y1="52.2012" x2="48.8" y2="41.4012" stroke="#8039FD" stroke-width="2"/>' +
                '</svg>' +
                '<span class="new-request-card-label">New request</span>' +
                '</div>';
        }

        function buildImplementationCard(impl, requestId) {
            var tagHtml = '';
            if (impl.tag === 'claimed') {
                tagHtml = '<span class="impl-tag">Claimed</span>';
            } else if (impl.tag === 'ready-for-review') {
                tagHtml = '<span class="impl-tag">Ready for review</span>';
            }
            var statusHtml = impl.statusLabel && impl.statusDate
                ? '<span class="impl-card-status">' + impl.statusLabel + ': ' + impl.statusDate + '</span>'
                : '';
            var authorHtml = impl.author
                ? '<span class="impl-card-author">by ' + impl.author + '</span>'
                : '';
            return '<div class="impl-card" data-impl-id="' + impl.id + '" data-request-id="' + requestId + '">' +
                '<div class="impl-card-content"><div class="impl-card-info">' +
                '<div class="impl-card-title-wrapper"><span class="impl-card-title">' + impl.title + '</span></div>' +
                statusHtml +
                authorHtml +
                '</div></div>' +
                tagHtml +
                '</div>';
        }

        function renderImplementations() {
            var emptyEl = document.getElementById('implementations-empty');
            var gridEl = document.getElementById('implementations-grid');
            if (!selectedRequestId || !currentData || !currentData.requests) {
                emptyEl.style.display = 'block';
                gridEl.style.display = 'none';
                gridEl.innerHTML = '';
                return;
            }
            var request = null;
            for (var i = 0; i < currentData.requests.length; i++) {
                if (currentData.requests[i].id === selectedRequestId) {
                    request = currentData.requests[i];
                    break;
                }
            }
            if (!request || !request.implementations || request.implementations.length === 0) {
                emptyEl.style.display = 'block';
                gridEl.style.display = 'none';
                gridEl.innerHTML = '';
                return;
            }
            emptyEl.style.display = 'none';
            gridEl.style.display = 'flex';
            var html = '';
            for (var j = 0; j < request.implementations.length; j++) {
                html += buildImplementationCard(request.implementations[j], request.id);
            }
            gridEl.innerHTML = html;
            // Attach click handlers
            var implCards = gridEl.querySelectorAll('.impl-card');
            for (var k = 0; k < implCards.length; k++) {
                (function (card) {
                    card.addEventListener('click', function () {
                        var implId = card.getAttribute('data-impl-id');
                        var reqId = card.getAttribute('data-request-id');
                        window.myop_cta_handler('implementation-clicked', {requestId: reqId, implementationId: implId});
                    });
                })(implCards[k]);
            }
        }

        function setupPreviewIframes() {
            var iframes = document.querySelectorAll('.request-card-preview-iframe');
            for (var i = 0; i < iframes.length; i++) {
                (function (iframe) {
                    var thumb = iframe.closest('.request-card-thumbnail');
                    if (!thumb || thumb.classList.contains('preview-loaded')) return;
                    iframe.onload = function () {
                        requestAnimationFrame(function () {
                            requestAnimationFrame(function () {
                                thumb.classList.add('preview-loaded');
                            });
                        });
                    };
                    // Fallback timeout
                    setTimeout(function () {
                        if (!thumb.classList.contains('preview-loaded')) {
                            thumb.classList.add('preview-loaded');
                        }
                    }, 1500);
                })(iframes[i]);
            }
        }

        function setupTitleScroll() {
            var wrappers = document.querySelectorAll('.request-card-title-wrapper, .impl-card-title-wrapper');
            for (var i = 0; i < wrappers.length; i++) {
                (function (wrapper) {
                    var title = wrapper.querySelector('.request-card-title, .impl-card-title');
                    if (!title) return;
                    var hoverTimer = null;
                    var animFrame = null;
                    var isHovering = false;

                    var didScroll = false;

                    function startScroll() {
                        var overflow = title.scrollWidth - wrapper.clientWidth;
                        if (overflow <= 0) return;
                        didScroll = true;
                        title.style.overflow = 'visible';
                        title.style.textOverflow = 'clip';

                        var speed = 30; // pixels per second (constant)
                        var currentPos = 0;
                        var lastTime = null;

                        function animate(timestamp) {
                            if (!isHovering) return;
                            if (!lastTime) {
                                lastTime = timestamp;
                            }
                            var delta = timestamp - lastTime;
                            lastTime = timestamp;
                            // Cap delta to avoid jumps (e.g. tab switching)
                            if (delta > 50) delta = 16;
                            currentPos += (speed * delta) / 1000;
                            if (currentPos >= overflow) {
                                currentPos = overflow;
                                title.style.transform = 'translateX(-' + currentPos + 'px)';
                                return; // stop at end
                            }
                            title.style.transform = 'translateX(-' + currentPos + 'px)';
                            animFrame = requestAnimationFrame(animate);
                        }

                        animFrame = requestAnimationFrame(animate);
                    }

                    wrapper.addEventListener('mouseenter', function () {
                        isHovering = true;
                        hoverTimer = setTimeout(function () {
                            startScroll();
                        }, 500);
                    });
                    wrapper.addEventListener('mouseleave', function () {
                        isHovering = false;
                        clearTimeout(hoverTimer);
                        if (animFrame) cancelAnimationFrame(animFrame);
                        if (!didScroll) return;
                        didScroll = false;
                        // Fade out, reset position, fade back in
                        title.style.transition = 'opacity 0.2s ease';
                        title.style.opacity = '0';
                        setTimeout(function () {
                            title.style.transform = 'translateX(0)';
                            title.style.overflow = 'hidden';
                            title.style.textOverflow = 'ellipsis';
                            title.style.transition = 'opacity 0.2s ease';
                            title.style.opacity = '1';
                            setTimeout(function () {
                                title.style.transition = '';
                            }, 200);
                        }, 200);
                    });
                })(wrappers[i]);
            }
        }


        function isRequestClosed(request) {
            if (closedRequests[request.id] !== undefined) return closedRequests[request.id];
            return request.status === 'closed';
        }

        function escapeAttr(str) {
            return str.replace(/&/g, '&').replace(/"/g, '"').replace(/</g, '<').replace(/>/g, '>');
        }

        function injectCenteringStyles(html) {
            var styles = '<style data-myop-experimental="preview-centering">' +
                'html, body { min-height: 100vh; margin: 0; }' +
                'body { display: flex !important; flex-direction: column !important; align-items: center !important; justify-content: center !important; }' +
                'body > *:first-child { max-width: 100%; }' +
                '</style>';
            if (html.indexOf('</head>') !== -1) {
                return html.replace('</head>', styles + '</head>');
            } else if (html.indexOf('<body') !== -1) {
                return html.replace('<body', styles + '<body');
            }
            return styles + html;
        }

        var loaderSvg = '<div class="request-card-preview-loading">' +
            '<svg class="myop-logo" width="40" height="19" viewBox="0 0 83 39" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">' +
            '<path d="M23.6143 0.427734C27.5492 0.428743 38.9059 0.525064 47.2725 8.92969C55.1915 16.885 57.3556 18.0109 61.3809 18.7598C61.7945 18.7939 62.5546 18.7843 63.0732 18.3369C63.4201 18.0375 63.5629 17.238 63.6172 16.4697V0.722656C63.6172 0.668042 63.6622 0.624156 63.7168 0.624023H82.4727C82.5274 0.624023 82.5723 0.667959 82.5723 0.722656V19.4785C82.572 19.533 82.5272 19.5781 82.4727 19.5781H66.415C65.8766 19.6285 65.1286 19.7685 64.6738 20.1582C64.1748 20.5863 64.0501 21.7422 64.0234 22.5068V38.0273C64.0232 38.0776 63.9885 38.1198 63.9385 38.125C57.9818 38.7248 43.6711 36.0441 37.1123 27.3301C31.8242 20.3042 27.1756 19.2282 23.6182 19.209C23.5637 19.2086 23.5198 19.1638 23.5195 19.1094V0.526367C23.5197 0.471988 23.5599 0.427932 23.6143 0.427734ZM9.78906 0C15.195 0.00021743 19.5771 4.38307 19.5771 9.78906C19.5769 15.1949 15.1949 19.5769 9.78906 19.5771C4.38307 19.5771 0.000217435 15.195 0 9.78906C0 4.38293 4.38293 0 9.78906 0Z" fill="url(#paint0_mkt_loader)"/>' +
            '<defs><linearGradient id="paint0_mkt_loader" x1="0%" y1="50%" x2="100%" y2="50%" gradientUnits="objectBoundingBox">' +
            '<stop offset="10.62%" stop-color="#FF8651"/><stop offset="32.97%" stop-color="#FFBEA8"/><stop offset="98.5%" stop-color="#A397F5"/>' +
            '</linearGradient></defs></svg></div>';

        function buildRequestCard(request) {
            var thumbHtml = '';
            var previewHtml = request.previewHtml || '';
            if (previewHtml) {
                thumbHtml = loaderSvg +
                    '<iframe class="request-card-preview-iframe" sandbox="allow-scripts allow-same-origin" srcdoc="' + escapeAttr(injectCenteringStyles(previewHtml)) + '"></iframe>' +
                    '<div class="request-card-preview-cover"></div>';
            } else if (request.thumbnailUrl) {
                thumbHtml = '<img src="' + request.thumbnailUrl + '" alt="' + request.title + '">';
            } else {
                thumbHtml = loaderSvg + '<div class="request-card-preview-cover"></div>';
            }
            var closedTag = isRequestClosed(request) ? '<span class="closed-tag">Closed</span>' : '';
            return '<div class="request-card" data-request-id="' + request.id + '">' +
                '<div class="request-card-thumbnail">' + thumbHtml + closedTag + '</div>' +
                '<div class="request-card-footer">' +
                '<div class="request-card-title-wrapper"><span class="request-card-title">' + request.title + '</span></div>' +
                '<button class="request-card-menu" data-menu-id="' + request.id + '">' +
                '<svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">' +
                '<g clip-path="url(#clip0_menu_' + request.id + ')">' +
                '<path d="M8 9C8.55228 9 9 8.55228 9 8C9 7.44772 8.55228 7 8 7C7.44772 7 7 7.44772 7 8C7 8.55228 7.44772 9 8 9Z" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>' +
                '<path d="M13 9C13.5523 9 14 8.55228 14 8C14 7.44772 13.5523 7 13 7C12.4477 7 12 7.44772 12 8C12 8.55228 12.4477 9 13 9Z" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>' +
                '<path d="M3 9C3.55228 9 4 8.55228 4 8C4 7.44772 3.55228 7 3 7C2.44772 7 2 7.44772 2 8C2 8.55228 2.44772 9 3 9Z" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>' +
                '</g>' +
                '<defs><clipPath id="clip0_menu_' + request.id + '"><rect width="16" height="16" fill="white"/></clipPath></defs>' +
                '</svg>' +
                '</button>' +
                '</div>' +
                '</div>';
        }

        function render(data) {
            // Mobile dashboard title
            if (data.dashboardTitle) {
                document.getElementById('mobile-dashboard-title').textContent = data.dashboardTitle;
            }

            // Header
            if (data.header) {
                document.getElementById('header-title').textContent = data.header.title;
            }

            var emptyEl = document.getElementById('empty-state');
            var filledEl = document.getElementById('filled-state');
            var hasRequests = data.requests && data.requests.length > 0;

            if (hasRequests) {
                emptyEl.style.display = 'none';
                filledEl.style.display = 'flex';

                // Section title
                if (data.sectionTitle) {
                    document.getElementById('section-title').textContent = data.sectionTitle;
                }

                // Hint text
                var hintEl = document.getElementById('hint-text');
                if (data.hint) {
                    hintEl.textContent = data.hint;
                    hintEl.style.display = 'block';
                } else {
                    hintEl.style.display = 'block';
                }

                // Skip full grid rebuild if only implementations changed
                var newGridKey = getGridKey(data.requests);
                if (lastGridKey === newGridKey && document.querySelectorAll('.request-card').length > 0) {
                    updateSelection();
                    return;
                }
                lastGridKey = newGridKey;

                // Build grid
                var gridHtml = buildNewRequestCard();
                for (var i = 0; i < data.requests.length; i++) {
                    gridHtml += buildRequestCard(data.requests[i]);
                }
                document.getElementById('requests-grid').innerHTML = gridHtml;

                // Attach event listeners
                var newReqCard = document.getElementById('new-request-card-btn');
                if (newReqCard) {
                    newReqCard.addEventListener('click', function () {
                        window.myop_cta_handler('new-request-clicked');
                    });
                }

                var requestCards = document.querySelectorAll('.request-card');
                for (var j = 0; j < requestCards.length; j++) {
                    (function (card) {
                        card.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
                            if (e.target.closest('.request-card-menu')) return;
                            var id = card.getAttribute('data-request-id');
                            if (selectedRequestId === id) {
                                selectedRequestId = null;
                                window.myop_cta_handler('request-deselected', {requestId: id});
                            } else {
                                selectedRequestId = id;
                                window.myop_cta_handler('request-selected', {requestId: id});
                            }
                            updateSelection();
                        });
                    })(requestCards[j]);
                }

                // Restore selection state after re-render
                updateSelection();
                setupTitleScroll();
                setupPreviewIframes();

                var menuBtns = document.querySelectorAll('.request-card-menu');
                for (var k = 0; k < menuBtns.length; k++) {
                    (function (btn) {
                        btn.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
                            e.stopPropagation();
                            var id = btn.getAttribute('data-menu-id');
                            if (openMenuId === id) {
                                closeMenu();
                            } else {
                                openMenu(id, btn);
                            }
                        });
                    })(menuBtns[k]);
                }

            } else {
                emptyEl.style.display = 'flex';
                filledEl.style.display = 'none';

                if (data.emptyState) {
                    document.getElementById('empty-title').textContent = data.emptyState.title;
                    document.getElementById('empty-description').textContent = data.emptyState.description;
                    document.getElementById('btn-new-request').querySelector('.btn-label').textContent = data.emptyState.buttonLabel;
                }
            }
        }

        document.getElementById('btn-new-request').addEventListener('click', function () {
            window.myop_cta_handler('new-request-clicked');
        });

        window.myop_init_interface = function (data) {
            if (!data) return currentData;
            currentData = data;
            render(data);
        };

        window.myop_cta_handler = function (action_id, payload) {
            // Will be overridden by host application
        };
    })();
</script>

<script id="myop_preview">
    window.myop_init_interface({
        dashboardTitle: "Marketplace",
        header: {
            title: "Marketplace"
        },
        emptyState: {
            title: "Create your first request",
            description: "Add details, generate a private link, and share it with a builder",
            buttonLabel: "New request"
        },
        liveUrl: "https://myop.so",
        sectionTitle: "Component requests",
        hint: "Click a request to see submissions",
        requests: [
            {
                id: "req-1", title: "Table", slug: "table-req-1", thumbnailUrl: "", implementations: [
                    {
                        id: "impl-1",
                        title: "Checkout",
                        statusLabel: "Claimed",
                        statusDate: "Apr 15, 2025",
                        author: "John Doe",
                        tag: "claimed"
                    },
                    {
                        id: "impl-2",
                        title: "Checkout",
                        statusLabel: "Ready",
                        statusDate: "Apr 15, 2025",
                        author: "Gal",

                    },
                    {
                        id: "impl-3",
                        title: "Checkout",
                        statusLabel: "Last edited",
                        statusDate: "Apr 15, 2025",
                        author: "John Doe"
                    },
                    {

                    },
                    {

                    }
                ]

    });
</script>
</body>
